name: Galloping Horses (Thai Appetizer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the peanuts.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan and add pork, garlic, and onions. Cook until the pink color disappears from the meat.
3. Drain most of the fat from the pan.
4. Add sugar and pepper, then cook for 1-2 minutes.
5. Add the ground peanuts and mix well. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
6. Prepare a platter by lining it with lettuce leaves.
7. Peel and segment the citrus fruits (tangerines, oranges, or pineapple). If using pineapple, cut each segment down to the core and fan them out to form a circle. Cut the spirals with a sharp knife held at about a 45-degree angle.
8. Arrange the fruit on the platter.
9. Mound the meat mixture onto the fruit and decorate with garnishes such as mint or coriander leaves and chopped chilis.
10. Serve at room temperature or chilled. (serves: 8-10)
